nasb.text: But the boat was already a long distance from the land, battered by the waves; for the wind was contrary.

esv.text: but the boat by this time was a long way from the land, beaten by the waves, for the wind was against them.

cnv.text: 那時門徒的船已經離岸數公里，因為逆風，被波浪沖擊。

ccb.text: 那时，门徒的船离岸已远，遇到逆风，船身被波浪撞击得摇摆不定。

csbs.text: 那时，船已经离岸有几百公尺，由于逆风，被波浪冲击。
